name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, bounded Ground Route Authority, 0.1.638 inventory-deposit crash safety, 0.1.639 stale supply-writ satisfaction clearing, and 0.1.640 infrastructure-first behavior gating so high-tier station/cogitator requests are deferred behind local emergency smelter/miner/assembler and basic plate production.
